channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: New details about suspect released
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: Fresh crew takes off on flight to International Space Station
item.description: The two-woman, two-man crew is replacing four other station fliers who came home early last month due to a medical issue one was having.

item.title: What's next after House rebukes Trump's tariffs on Canada?
item.description: The anti-tariff House vote will likely prove symbolic, since the measure faces challenging odds in the Senate and a potential veto from Trump, analyst...

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon set to be arraigned in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: Former CNN host turned independent journalist Don Lemon is set to be arraigned in federal court in Minnesota on Friday, along with four other defendan...

item.title: Brazilian au pair faces sentencing in scheme to kill lover's wife and another man
item.description: A Brazilian au pair is facing a judge after confessing to scheming with her lover to kill his wife and another man

item.title: 2/12: CBS Evening News
item.description: The FBI announces new details on masked suspect in Nancy Guthrie case; Border czar Tom Homan says Operation Metro Surge in Minnesota is concluding.

item.title: CIA releases new video aiming to recruit Chinese military officers
item.description: The CIA has released a new Mandarin-language recruitment video aimed at Chinese military officers, hoping to persuade those disenchanted with corrupti...

item.title: WATCH: Trump hasn't disciplined staffer he says posted video with racist image of Obamas
item.description: President Trump said he has not disciplined or fired the staffer that, according to both Trump and the White House, posted a video that included a rac...

item.title: Sex workers in Nevada fighting to become first in U.S. to unionize
item.description: Nevada is the only state where people can legally purchase sex, and now sex workers at one of the state's oldest brothels, Sheri's Ranch, are fighting...

item.title: Border czar says Minnesota immigration crackdown is over, after angry protests and 2 fatal shootings
WATCH: NHL stars return to Olympic hockey for 1st time in 12 years
item.description: The U.S. men's hockey team begins its quest for Olympic gold on Thursday as NHL stars return to the winter games for the first time since 2014.

item.title: Scientific studies calculate climate change as health danger, while Trump calls it a âscamâ
